# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- First general instruction
- Second general instruction

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules
- Follow naming conventions

## Project-Specific Rules
- Modify only header and sidebar styling in DashboardShell:
  - Implement curvy/rounded visuals
  - Add hover effects on navigation buttons
  - Create a pill-style theme toggle with dark default and light variant
- Keep content panel as dummy; no content changes required.
- Define the structure of AdminDashboardPage in the Designer.cs file; apply colors, fonts, and rounding only in the code-behind (AdminDashboardPage.cs). Focus on the lower cards (blood breakdown, expiring units, recent patients) and ignore top stat cards.
